description_long: This motorcycle features a futuristic, streamlined design with a predominantly white body accented by a bold green stripe running along the top. The chassis is compact and enclosed, with a black central section that appears to house the engine and internal components. The front end is equipped with articulated, claw-like appendages that may function as stabilizers or unique wheel covers, giving it a robotic appearance. The side panels are smooth and rounded, with minimal visible seams, and a small circular detail is present on each side. The overall build suggests a lightweight, high-tech construction, possibly for urban or experimental use. The absence of visible wheels and the unconventional structure set it apart from traditional motorcycles.
description: A sleek, white motorcycle with a green stripe and a futuristic, enclosed design featuring articulated front appendages and a compact, streamlined body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow, enclosed nose with articulated claw-like appendages extending outward, emphasizing the robotic and futuristic design.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the smooth, rounded white body with a green stripe and a black central section, highlighting the compactness and lack of visible wheels.
description_view_2: Top view displays the full length of the green stripe and the symmetrical, aerodynamic shape of the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the left, showing the same smooth white panel, green stripe, and black undercarriage, with visible appendages at the front.
